### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Follows project conventions (`AGENTS.md`)
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Tests added/updated — `poetry run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Lint — `poetry run ruff check .` and `poetry run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] Types — `poetry run mypy` passes
- [ ] No secrets committed; new env vars added to `.env.example`
- [ ] OpenAPI / `README.md` updated if user-facing API or setup changed
